definition: Transport Ownership Graph = nodes are connected components of equivalent renderer transport signatures; edges are observed adjacency/seam relations between components.
guardrail: Transport ownership graphs are diagnostic-only renderer validation data. They must not feed rendering, scheduling, hit selection, shading, resolver decisions, traversal, or adaptive precision.
oracle_sample_warning: Oracle ladder-only data may annotate unstable sampled pixels, but must not be reported as full-frame graph persistence.
